spacing_and_layout.global_spacing: Tight padding (p-3) and gaps (gap-3) for operational data efficiency, combined with generous outer margins for breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Rounded-xl with subtle inner padding (p-4 to p-6 depending on context) to maintain the clean form-focused UI.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for Admin (Dense, data correlation), Bento Grid for Student Dashboard.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surface_styles.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all
surface_styles.buttons: rounded-lg font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95

components.login_form: Minimalist center-aligned card over an abstract light architecture background. Clean input fields with blue focus glow.
components.student_dashboard: Two-column bento layout. Left: Read-only auto-filled student data (JetBrains Mono for data). Right: Actionable form for T-Shirt Size (Shadcn Select) and Payment Summary.
components.payment_summary: Invoice-style receipt card. Slate borders, clear line items. Green 'Pay Now' CTA.
components.success_screen: Generous whitespace. Large green success icon. JetBrains Mono for Payment ID. Monochromatic subtle confetti or Framer Motion scale-in effect.
components.admin_dashboard: Dense data table. Use IBM Plex Sans for headers and JetBrains Mono for row data. Action-paired insights at the top (e.g., '15 Pending Payments').

animations.transitions: Smooth transitions with Framer Motion. Use 'layout' prop for smooth height adjustments on forms.
animations.interactive: Hover lifts (-translate-y-0.5) on cards. Active scale-down on buttons (scale: 0.98).

login_background.description: Minimalist abstract white architectural ceiling/wall to serve as a clean, non-distracting background for the login page.

admin_empty_state.description: Abstract spiral architecture for empty states or decorative side-panels in the admin dashboard.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React for crisp, clean, SaaS-style icons. Keep stroke-width to 1.5 or 2 depending on weight.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected fonts: Barlow Condensed (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body), JetBrains Mono (Data/Numbers/IDs).
All form inputs must use the specified focus states (ring-blue-100, border-blue-500) to create a subtle 'blue glow'.
Implement tight spacing (p-3, gap-3) within functional components (forms, tables) to maintain an operational SaaS feel.
Use 'rounded-xl' for main cards and 'rounded-lg' for internal inputs and buttons.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'tshirt-size-dropdown').
Do NOT use raw HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn UI components and customize them with the provided surface styles.
The Payment Success screen should prominently feature the Payment ID using JetBrains Mono in a copyable field.
Admin dashboard must prioritize data readability—use JetBrains Mono for tabular data.
